review_title: Will be unbeatable and a must for daily agency use (after a few more releases)
description: They have an active team working on the product. I can see updates every few months.
author: Adam L.
pros: How easy it is to create professional grafics perfect for branded images and social post. The Ai will bascially overall the image, text, and CTA you chosen with their templates, and gives you tons of choices.
cons: 'The Ai will bascially overall the image, text, and CTA you chosen with their templates, and gives you tons of choices.' Well that's basically what it does for me so far, it does try to tell me which template is the highest converting using Machine learning, but no-matter which graphic I chose, and regarless what txt I choose, the 'highest converting' ranking is always the same. Meaning the Ai and ML only do the predicting on its' templates' and not on the things you uploaded. That to me might be alittle limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Avoid - will not give you a refund even when they charged the wrong amount
description: Bad experience - Charged the wrong amount, then refuse to give me a refund. Feels like a scam. Cancelling the subscription is difficult with multiple popups.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I did not get to use it as I was surprised by the Credit card charge. They gave only 7 days trial which I was not able to check out in that time.
cons: They advertised a discounted rate, then charged the full price after the 7 days, did not send me an email to let me know they were going to charge me, and the price is in US dollars so AU$510 instead of $125 advertised (and that is per month!!!) They will not refund my money I have been back and forth regarding cancellation and they have just kept stalling.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: BEWARE. Not easy to use. Predatory Billing processes.
description: Terrible. I used the 7-day trial to see if the software fit my needs. It did not because it does not generate mobile display ad sizes. Their 5-day notice email went to my spam folder, and I missed canceling my account in time. They charged me $339 for one of their top tiers. I offered to pay $40, which is their lowest monthly tiers and they said I wasn't eligible.
author: Aaron B.
pros: Generated quite a few templated options for DESKTOP display ads using simple AI prompts. Easy to set up a brand and will pull colors from a logo.
cons: Does NOT generate for mobile ad sizes. They also have absolutely terrible customer service for helping to use the software, and on the billing side as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Watch Billing and Cancellation Carefully
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Not much. AI is not great, other competitions such as Predis and Blaze are much better. Not much. AI is not great, other competitions such as Predis and Blaze are much better.
cons: I experienced multiple charges after believing I had cancelled my subscription. The cancellation flow required additional steps, and I did not receive clear billing notifications. Support was responsive but limited by policy and only refunded the latest charge. Overall, the tool may have value, but billing transparency and cancellation clarity need improvement.

I didn't know I was being charged for 2 months ! Didn't even use the app. Thankfully I checked my credit card but they still refuse to refund me. It's a marketing strategy they use.

review_title: Shady billing process to capitalise on trial
description: I had to contest the transactions from my credit card provider and to do this, they need to change my whole credit card number so I will have to connect within about 20 different service provider to share them my new credit card information. They could have make it simple and just reimburse us, like any other company would do in such a situation. Thy have lost a lot of my time and tried to still from us. I don't recommend these guy and I highly recommend you stay away from them and just use Canva or Adobe Illustrator if you are more advanced user.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I didn't enjoy my experience. It state things such as chat GPT and Canva who had a baby, but Canva have AI capacity and so I found out very fast that Canva was a superior tool and is costing me 15$ per month despite costing 200$ CAD with Adcreative
cons: I cancel my account after couple minute of testing the trial, but I was then charge for multiple month without any notification of remittance nor bill send our way. We have contact the billing team to ask for a full refund and they have refuse to proceed. In my opinion, they are purposely trying to capitalize on trial and most company now offered trial with no credit card information to avoid things like this to occur. If they know how to generate complexe AI design, they sure know how to create automation so we receive bill remittance notification and they know how to create a trial that doesn't require credit card information. To me I see it very clear, this company is not an honest one.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Artificial Intelligence Creatives
description: I've been doing marketing for over a decade. I've done campaigns in all kinds of industries. When I first started using I was amazed at the breadth of features it provided to help me create ads and banners that would convert my prospects into customers. It's really helped me streamline the process from start to finish! Plus, I can create more content in less time. If you want to be more successful with your advertising efforts, I highly recommend checking out this platform and seeing if it could work for you too!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Is a new artificial intelligence platform that automates the process of creating banner ads and creatives for Facebook, Twitter, Pinterest, LinkedIn, Google Ads, and more. This revolutionary AI automatically matches your message to the appropriate audience on these platforms. You can create creatives in minutes or automate them over time based on triggers like competitor ads or specific keywords. The results are guaranteed – banners will appear as organic content on their own pages, or you’ll receive click data from our system. When you use this AI it becomes easy to compare campaign performance because all work is done by one source
cons: No, it is all set! The platform provides marketers with a real-time solution by producing proven ad creatives as well as helping them find new ways to create effective campaigns.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Creatives with ease
description: Rapid testing content creation takes time and is frequently expensive. All you can do with your advertising when you initially start out is make educated guesses about what will work. Adcreative makes it easier for us to move from "testing" to creating "data-backed" creative than if we had to do it all manually.
author: Ifeanyi K.
pros: I can swiftly create on-brand ads and images for A/B testing with the aid of Adcreative.ai. I can produce ad test creative in about 15 minutes using my four codes. The dashboard is really simple to use, which made it quick for me to set up the brands we handle. I spent far less time copying and pasting thanks to built-in capabilities like the HEX color extractor, and integrating with Facebook and Google only took a few seconds. This has been an excellent investment as a scaling tool for creativity. Our Creatives create some example mockups, use Adcreative.ai to generate a large number of samples, and then choose the best ones to keep. Adcreative.ai has been a pleasant and already financially profitable experience, which is unusual for me with.ai-based solutions.
cons: The generator can be a little slow while creating the advertising. I typically leave my browser open, get a cup of coffee, and then when I return to my work, I appreciate the results.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Poorly designed product
description: Our overall experience can only be described as a waste of time, and this is a highly unethical company that lies about the quality of its product, provides refunds, and pretty much everything. Avoid them, save your money, and don't waste it with the poor quality results they will deliver.
author: Sean C.
pros: There are no pros for this product. Its poorly designed with poor customer service
cons: The product is like using templates from the 1990s. Really really bad. We did the trial, and based on how p[oor the designs were, we decided not to go ahead, yet they still charged our credit card. They promised a full refund when we contacted them back in February because they should not have charged us. As of one month later, we still have not received the refund, and when we contacted them, they just said, "It's in the queue." Poor customer service and highly unethical. Avoid this business. They are extremely dishonest and untrustworthy, and the product is rubbish.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

It didn't give me enough time to use all the features or form a true opinion of the tool. Once the trial was up instead of being charged $30 it has been well OVER $100. I need someone to call me or email me regarding this discrepancy. My number is [sensitive content hidden], you have received several emails from that have gone unanswered. [sensitive content hidden]

The quality of the AI blew me away, as I never use these features because from my experience they are always just BAD. The technology doesnt work yet and the results are... not good :) In case of adcreative the AI tool is saving me so much time and I use these designs to deliver advertisements for my clients who are promoting 6 and 7 figure businesses. That means these designs work and can run a business, can't tell that about any other app.
cons: I haven't found anything that I did not like about this app. It's really good.

Sometimes just a slight change is what I need, but without that slight change (like shifting an element up, down, left, right) the image is unusable. Also, sometimes when I click a button, nothing happens. I have to refresh the page or start all over to make it work properly.
